response.overview: Join Kobie dog on her whimsical coast-to-coast adventures where she transforms her owner's world into a playground of nature and photography. This real-life 'Marley & Me' story weaves a decade of travels—stretching from the shores of San Diego to the peaks of the Smoky Mountains—into a final, heartfelt road trip to New Orleans. Through the lens of their inseparable bond, the film navigates the heartbreaking and universal challenges we all face as our beloved pets inevitably age.
response.title: My Dog's Final "Stay"
